description: κ-driven deliberation contract for topology-aware focused reasoning over cyclic knowledge regions, including decomposition, reconciliation, and optional crystallization.

deliberate.description: Run focused deliberation over SCC regions selected by κ-routing and return reconciled conclusions.

decompose.description: Decompose cyclic regions into fault-line partitions for scoped reasoning.

reconcile.description: Reconcile partition-level intermediates into a single conclusion set with confidence.

metadata.notes: Representative contract for κ-aware reasoning in the [&] Protocol.
